```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

## Check age in males and females

```{r}
age_f <- as.numeric(as.character(dproc[["meta"]][dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female",][["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]]))
age_m <- as.numeric(as.character(dproc[["meta"]][dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Male",][["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]]))
avg_age_f <- round(mean(age_f, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
avg_age_m <- round(mean(age_m, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
sd_age_f <- round(sd(age_f, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
sd_age_m <- round(sd(age_m, na.rm = TRUE), 1)

print(paste("Average age females: ", avg_age_f, " +- ", sd_age_f))
print(paste("Average age females: ", avg_age_m, " +- ", sd_age_m))
```



```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores[["subject.cmv"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["pca_loadings"]] + ggtitle("subject.cmv")
```


## Composition boxplots comparing main groups

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=30}
composition_boxplot(scoot_summary_L3_authors, group_by = "subject.cmv")
composition_boxplot(scoot_summary_L3_authors, group_by = "cohort.cohortGuid")
```


# Save scores

```{r}
cache_filename <- file.path(path_output, sprintf("%s.scoot_scores.rds", ds_name))
saveRDS(scores, cache_filename)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# QUICKLOAD scores

```{r}
cache_filename <- file.path(path_output, sprintf("%s.scoot_scores.rds", ds_name))
scores <- readRDS(cache_filename)
```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Plot PCA of freq vs clr vs arcsin-sqrt

```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=9}
results <- data.frame(
  "Layer" = character(),
  "Clustering on raw features" = numeric(),
  "Clustering on PCA" = numeric(),
  "Silhouette score" = numeric(),
  "Silhouette score PCA" = numeric(),
  "Modularity score" = numeric(),
  "Modularity score PCA" = numeric()
)

for (layer in c(
  # "L1",
  # "L2",
  "L3"
  )) {
  test_list <- list(counts = dproc[[layer]]$cell_counts,
                    freq = dproc[[layer]]$freq,
                    asin_sqrt = asin(sqrt(dproc[[layer]]$freq)),
                    clr_1count_zero = dproc[[layer]]$clr_1count_zero,
                    clr_1count_all = dproc[[layer]]$clr_1count_all,
                    clr_0.01perc = dproc[[layer]]$clr_0.01perc)
  
  for (nam in names(test_list)) {
  
    clust_labels <- scoot_summary_L3_authors@metadata[match(row.names(test_list[[nam]]), scoot_summary_L3_authors@metadata$scoot_sample), ]$subject.cmv
    
    clust_results_raw <- clust_eval(test_list[[nam]], clust_labels)
    # print(paste("Raw: ", nam, clust_results_raw))

    plot_pca(test_list[[nam]], clust_labels, nam)
    
    # Extract principal component scores
    res.pca <- prcomp(test_list[[nam]])
    pca_scores <- as.data.frame(res.pca$x)  # Convert to data frame if necessary
    
    clust_results_pca <- clust_eval(pca_scores[, 1:3], clust_labels)
    # print(paste("PCA: ", nam, clust_results_pca))
    
    # # Plotting with plotly
    # p <- plot_ly(data = pca_scores, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3, type = "scatter3d",
    #              color = factor(clust_labels),
    #              mode = "markers", marker = list(size = 5)) %>%
    #   layout(scene = list(xaxis = list(title = "PC1"),
    #                       yaxis = list(title = "PC2"),
    #                       zaxis = list(title = "PC3")))
    # print(p)
    
    sil_score <- round(calc_sil(test_list[[nam]], clust_labels), 3)
    sil_score_pca <- round(calc_sil(pca_scores[, 1:3], clust_labels), 3)
    mod_score <- round(calc_modularity(test_list[[nam]], clust_labels), 3)
    mod_score_pca <- round(calc_modularity(pca_scores[, 1:3], clust_labels), 3)
    
    df_res <- data.frame(
      "Layer" = paste0(layer, "_", nam),
      "Clustering on raw features" = clust_results_raw,
      "Clustering on PCA" = clust_results_pca,
      "Silhouette score" = sil_score,
      "Silhouette score PCA" = sil_score_pca,
      "Modularity score" = mod_score,
      "Modularity score PCA" = mod_score_pca
    )
    
    results <- rbind(results, df_res)
  }
}


for (nam in names(test_list)) {

  clust_labels <- scoot_summary_L3_authors@metadata[match(row.names(test_list[[nam]]), scoot_summary_L3_authors@metadata$scoot_sample), ]$cohort.cohortGuid
  plot_pca(test_list[[nam]], clust_labels, nam)

  # Extract principal component scores
  res.pca <- prcomp(test_list[[nam]])
  pca_scores <- as.data.frame(res.pca$x)  # Convert to data frame if necessary
  
  # # Plotting with plotly
  # p <- plot_ly(data = pca_scores, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3, type = "scatter3d",
  #              color = factor(clust_labels),
  #              mode = "markers", marker = list(size = 5)) %>%
  #   layout(scene = list(xaxis = list(title = "PC1"),
  #                       yaxis = list(title = "PC2"),
  #                       zaxis = list(title = "PC3")))
  # print(p)
}
```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# CMV negative

## Create scoot objects based on author annotation

```{r}
cmv_neg_samples <- dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative"

for (layer in names(data)) {
  df_counts <- dproc[[layer]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_samples,]
  df_freq <- dproc[[layer]]$freq[cmv_neg_samples,] * 100
  df_clr <- dproc[[layer]]$clr[cmv_neg_samples,]
  
  cols <- colnames(df_counts)
  
  df_counts$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_counts)
  df_freq$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_freq)
  df_clr$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_clr)

  df_counts_long <- df_counts %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "cell_counts")
  df_freq_long <- df_freq %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "freq")
  df_clr_long <- df_clr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "clr")
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_counts_long,
                              df_freq_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_long,
                              df_clr_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  
  ctable <- list(layer_1 = df_long)
  
  meta <- dproc$meta
  colnames(meta)[colnames(meta) == "specimen.specimenGuid"] <- "scoot_sample"
  
  assign(paste0("scoot_summary_", layer, "_authors_cmv_neg"),
         methods::new("scoot",
                      data = list(composition = ctable),
                      metadata = meta,
                      version = packageVersion("scooter"))
  )
}
```


```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=9}
ctable_layer_2 <- list()

for (ct in names(cell_name_list)) {
  df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_samples,]
  
  # Subset to CMV negative
  
  # Subset df_counts to ct
  df_counts <- df_counts[, cell_name_list[[ct]]]
  
  # Drop samples with zero subtype cells
  df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1
  
  # Calculate freq and clr for each ct
  df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts/rowSums(df_counts) * 100)
  df_clr <- Hotelling::clr(df_freq)
  
  cols <- colnames(df_counts)
  
  df_counts$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_counts)
  df_freq$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_freq)
  df_clr$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_clr)

  df_counts_long <- df_counts %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "cell_counts")
  df_freq_long <- df_freq %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "freq")
  df_clr_long <- df_clr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "clr")
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_counts_long,
                              df_freq_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_long,
                              df_clr_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  
  ctable_layer_2[[ct]] <- df_long
}

scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg@data$composition$layer_2 <- ctable_layer_2
```


## Get scores L3 (authors) with layers

```{r}
scores_cmv_neg <- get_cluster_score(scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg,
                                    cluster_by = colnames(data[["L3"]][1:13])[colnames(data[["L3"]][1:13]) != "subject.cmv"])
```


## Summary plots

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=40}
summarized_scores_cmv_neg <- summarize_cluster_scores(scores_cmv_neg, p_value_cutoff = 1)
```


```{r fig.height=30, fig.width=5}
summarized_scores_cmv_neg <- scooter:::summarized_scores_barplot(summarized_scores_cmv_neg)
```

## Check age in BR1 and BR2

```{r}
age_BR1 <- as.numeric(as.character(dproc[["meta"]][dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1",][["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]]))
age_BR2 <- as.numeric(as.character(dproc[["meta"]][dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR2",][["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]]))
avg_age_BR1 <- round(mean(age_BR1, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
avg_age_BR2 <- round(mean(age_BR2, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
sd_age_BR1 <- round(sd(age_BR1, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
sd_age_BR2 <- round(sd(age_BR2, na.rm = TRUE), 1)

print(paste("Average age BR1: ", avg_age_BR1, " +- ", sd_age_BR1))
print(paste("Average age BR2: ", avg_age_BR2, " +- ", sd_age_BR2))
```

## Plot PCAs

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "unsupervised.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")

scores_cmv_neg[["cohort.cohortGuid"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("cohort.cohortGuid")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "cohort.cohortGuid.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.subjectGuid"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.subjectGuid")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.subjectGuid.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.biologicalSex")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.biologicalSex.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)

scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.bmi")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.bmi.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.race")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.race.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.birthYear.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD8"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD4"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")

scores_cmv_neg[["subject.ageAtFirstDraw"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.ageAtFirstDraw")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.ageAtFirstDraw.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg[["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("sample.subjectAgeAtDraw")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "sample.subjectAgeAtDraw.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)

scores_cmv_neg[["sample.visitName"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("sample.visitName")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "sample.visitName.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["cohort.cohortGuid"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["pca_loadings"]] + ggtitle("cohort.cohortGuid")

```


```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```


# Save scores

```{r}
cache_filename <- file.path(path_output, sprintf("%s.scoot_scores_cmv_neg.rds", ds_name))
saveRDS(scores_cmv_neg, cache_filename)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# QUICKLOAD scores

```{r}
cache_filename <- file.path(path_output, sprintf("%s.scoot_scores_cmv_neg.rds", ds_name))
scores_cmv_neg <- readRDS(cache_filename)
```


# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# CMV negative BR1

## Create scoot objects based on author annotation

```{r}
cmv_neg_BR1_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1")

for (layer in names(data)) {
  df_counts <- dproc[[layer]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_samples,]
  df_freq <- dproc[[layer]]$freq[cmv_neg_BR1_samples,] * 100
  df_clr <- dproc[[layer]]$clr[cmv_neg_BR1_samples,]
  
  cols <- colnames(df_counts)
  
  df_counts$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_counts)
  df_freq$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_freq)
  df_clr$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_clr)

  df_counts_long <- df_counts %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "cell_counts")
  df_freq_long <- df_freq %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "freq")
  df_clr_long <- df_clr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "clr")
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_counts_long,
                              df_freq_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_long,
                              df_clr_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  
  ctable <- list(layer_1 = df_long)
  
  meta <- dproc$meta
  colnames(meta)[colnames(meta) == "specimen.specimenGuid"] <- "scoot_sample"
  
  assign(paste0("scoot_summary_", layer, "_authors_cmv_neg_BR1"),
         methods::new("scoot",
                      data = list(composition = ctable),
                      metadata = meta,
                      version = packageVersion("scooter"))
  )
}
```


```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=9}
ctable_layer_2 <- list()

for (ct in names(cell_name_list)) {
  df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_samples,]
  
  # Subset to CMV negative
  
  # Subset df_counts to ct
  df_counts <- df_counts[, cell_name_list[[ct]]]
  
  # Drop samples with zero subtype cells
  df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1
  
  # Calculate freq and clr for each ct
  df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts/rowSums(df_counts) * 100)
  df_clr <- Hotelling::clr(df_freq)
  
  cols <- colnames(df_counts)
  
  df_counts$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_counts)
  df_freq$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_freq)
  df_clr$scoot_sample <- rownames(df_clr)

  df_counts_long <- df_counts %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "cell_counts")
  df_freq_long <- df_freq %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "freq")
  df_clr_long <- df_clr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = cols,
                 names_to = "celltype",
                 values_to = "clr")
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_counts_long,
                              df_freq_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  df_long <- dplyr::left_join(df_long,
                              df_clr_long,
                              by = c("scoot_sample", "celltype"))
  
  ctable_layer_2[[ct]] <- df_long
}

scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1@data$composition$layer_2 <- ctable_layer_2
```


## Get scores L3 (authors) with layers

```{r}
scores_cmv_neg_BR1 <- get_cluster_score(scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1,
                                        cluster_by = colnames(data[["L3"]][1:13])[!colnames(data[["L3"]][1:13]) %in% c("cohort.cohortGuid", "subject.cmv")])
```


## Plot PCAs

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "unsupervised.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["unsupervised"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("unsupervised")

scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.subjectGuid"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.subjectGuid")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.subjectGuid.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.biologicalSex")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.biologicalSex.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)

scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.bmi")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.bmi.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.race"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.race")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.race.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.birthYear.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD8"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.birthYear"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD4"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.birthYear")

scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.ageAtFirstDraw"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("subject.ageAtFirstDraw")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "subject.ageAtFirstDraw.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["sample.subjectAgeAtDraw"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("sample.subjectAgeAtDraw")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "sample.subjectAgeAtDraw.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)

scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["sample.visitName"]][["composition"]][["layer_1"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]] + ggtitle("sample.visitName")
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "sample.visitName.pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
```


```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD8"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["CD4"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.biologicalSex"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["gdT"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["NK"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["DC"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Mono"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["B_cell"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
scores_cmv_neg_BR1[["subject.bmi"]][["composition"]][["layer_2"]][["Progenitor"]][["plots"]][["summary_plot"]]
```

## 3D PCA

```{r}
df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_samples,]

# Subset to CMV negative

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1


# Calculate freq and clr for each ct
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts/rowSums(df_counts) * 100)
df_clr <- Hotelling::clr(df_freq)



res.pca <- prcomp(df_counts)

# Extract principal component scores
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(res.pca$x)  # Convert to data frame if necessary

clust_labels <- scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1@metadata[match(row.names(df_clr), scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1@metadata$scoot_sample), ]$subject.biologicalSex

# Plotting with plotly
plot_ly(data = pca_scores, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3, type = "scatter3d",
        color = factor(clust_labels),
        mode = "markers", marker = list(size = 5)) %>%
  layout(scene = list(xaxis = list(title = "PC1"),
                      yaxis = list(title = "PC2"),
                      zaxis = list(title = "PC3")))


res.pca <- prcomp(df_clr)

# Extract principal component scores
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(res.pca$x)  # Convert to data frame if necessary

clust_labels <- scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1@metadata[match(row.names(df_clr), scoot_summary_L3_authors_cmv_neg_BR1@metadata$scoot_sample), ]$subject.biologicalSex

# Plotting with plotly
plot_ly(data = pca_scores, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3, type = "scatter3d",
        color = factor(clust_labels),
        mode = "markers", marker = list(size = 5)) %>%
  layout(scene = list(xaxis = list(title = "PC1"),
                      yaxis = list(title = "PC2"),
                      zaxis = list(title = "PC3")))
```


# Save scores

```{r}
cache_filename <- file.path(path_output, sprintf("%s.scoot_scores_cmv_neg_BR1.rds", ds_name))
saveRDS(scores_cmv_neg_BR1, cache_filename)
```


# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# FOR PUBLICATION

# Sensitivity: freq vs clr vs alr vs ilr

CMV negative BR1 female samples are used, as the biggest sources of variation has been removed (subset to specific groups according to major axis of variance).
Subsequently, one or multiple cell types will be artificially increased/decreased to simulate differential abundance.


## L1 anotations

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L1"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(1, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 2, 3)

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select)
                   
```

### Summarized results

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 3
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```




## L2 anotations

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L2"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 300)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10)
reps <- 1:20

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select)
```

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]
```


### Mean-variance relationship

```{r}
df_freq_unperturbed <- na.omit(df_counts/rowSums(df_counts))
plot(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed), main = "colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed)")
plot(colMeans(df_freq), main = "colMeans(df_freq)")
plot(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed), main = "colVars(df_freq_unperturbed)")
plot(Rfast::colVars(df_freq), main = "colVars(df_freq)")
plot(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed), Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed))
plot(colMeans(df_freq), Rfast::colVars(df_freq))
plot(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed) / Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed))
plot(colMeans(df_freq) / Rfast::colVars(df_freq))

means <- colMeans(clr(df_freq))
vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(clr(df_freq)))

df1 <- data.frame(mean = means, variance = vars)
labs <- ct_da
idx <- which(row.names(df1) %in% labs)

ggplot(df1, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(data = df1[idx, ], aes(label = labs), vjust = -0.5)


means <- colMeans(clr(df_freq_unperturbed))
vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(clr(df_freq_unperturbed)))

df2 <- data.frame(mean = means, variance = vars)
labs <- ct_da
idx <- which(row.names(df2) %in% labs)

ggplot(df2, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(data = df2[idx, ], aes(label = labs), vjust = -0.5)


df1$group <- factor("perturbed")
df1$ct <- row.names(df1)
df2$group <- factor("original")
df2$ct <- row.names(df2)
df3 <- rbind(df1, df2)
idx <- which(df3$ct %in% labs)

ggplot(df3, aes(x = mean, y = variance, color = group)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(data = df3[idx, ], aes(label = c(labs, labs)), vjust = -0.5)



means <- colMeans(asin(sqrt(df_freq_unperturbed)))
vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(asin(sqrt(df_freq_unperturbed))))

df3 <- data.frame(mean = means, variance = vars)
labs <- ct_da
idx <- which(row.names(df2) %in% labs)

ggplot(df3, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(data = df3[idx, ], aes(label = labs), vjust = -0.5)
```

### Summarized results

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```




## L3 annotations

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 300)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select)

```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]
```


```{r}
plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```



## L3 annotations unbalanced counts

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")


# Generate random numbers between -1 and 1 for each row
random_numbers <- runif(nrow(df_counts), min = -1, max = 1)

# Exponentiate 10 with each random number
multiplier <- 10^random_numbers

# Multiply each row by the corresponding multiplier
df_counts <- sweep(df_counts, 1, multiplier, `*`)

df_counts <- round(df_counts)

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 300)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select)

```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 20
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```



## L3 annotations only low abundant cell types DA

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")


# Generate random numbers between -1 and 1 for each row
random_numbers <- runif(nrow(df_counts), min = -1, max = 1)

# Exponentiate 10 with each random number
multiplier <- 10^random_numbers

# Multiply each row by the corresponding multiplier
df_counts <- sweep(df_counts, 1, multiplier, `*`)

df_counts <- round(df_counts)

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 300)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

ct_counts <- colMeans(df_counts)
# Find the threshold for the lowest fourth
threshold <- quantile(ct_counts, 1/4)

# Get the column names with means below the threshold
cts <- colnames(df_counts)[ct_counts < threshold]

n_ct_to_select[n_ct_to_select >= length(cts)] <- length(cts)

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select, cts = cts)

```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts

ct_da <- sample(cts, size = nct)

half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```



## L3 annotations only highly abundant cell types DA

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

# Drop samples with zero subtype cells and impute zeros
df_counts <- df_counts[!rowSums(df_counts) == 0,] + 1

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")


# Generate random numbers between -1 and 1 for each row
random_numbers <- runif(nrow(df_counts), min = -1, max = 1)

# Exponentiate 10 with each random number
multiplier <- 10^random_numbers

# Multiply each row by the corresponding multiplier
df_counts <- sweep(df_counts, 1, multiplier, `*`)

df_counts <- round(df_counts)

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
perc_diffs <- c(5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 300)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

ct_counts <- colMeans(df_counts)
# Find the threshold for the lowest fourth
threshold <- quantile(ct_counts, 3/4)

# Get the column names with means below the threshold
cts <- colnames(df_counts)[ct_counts >= threshold]

n_ct_to_select[n_ct_to_select >= length(cts)] <- length(cts)

results <- datrans(count_mat, perc_diffs, n_ct_to_select, cts = cts)
```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(method, perc_diff) %>%
    mutate(silhouette = mean(silhouette),
           modularity = mean(modularity),
           clustering = mean(clustering)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(method, perc_diff), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = silhouette, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = perc_diff, y = clustering, color = method), size = 1.2) +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = perc_diff, y = modularity, color = method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 1
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts

ct_da <- sample(cts, size = nct)

half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before)) + 1
df_freq <- na.omit(df_counts_temp/rowSums(df_counts_temp))

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq))
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```


# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# FOR PUBLICATION

## Compare deconvolution cell type composition vs scRNA-seq composition

```{r}
deconv_ct_comps <- readRDS(file = file.path(path_data, "deconv_ct_comps.rds"))

deconv_ct_comps_harmonized <- deconv_ct_comps %>%
  rename("Bcells" = "B_cell") %>%
  mutate(T_cell = CD4_Tcells + CD8_Tcells) %>% dplyr::select(-CD4_Tcells, -CD8_Tcells) %>%
  rename("Monocytes" = "Monocyte") %>%
  rename("NKcells" = "NK_cell") %>%
  mutate(otherCells = otherCells + Neutrophils) %>% dplyr::select(-Neutrophils)

dproc_harmonized <- dproc$L1$freq %>%
  mutate(otherCells = DC + ILC + Progenitor_cell) %>% dplyr::select(-DC, -ILC, -Progenitor_cell)

dproc_harmonized <- dproc_harmonized %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(names(deconv_ct_comps_harmonized)))

ct_comp_diff <- deconv_ct_comps_harmonized - dproc_harmonized

# Combine the two data frames and add a new column to differentiate them
df_combined <- bind_rows(
  deconv_ct_comps_harmonized %>% mutate(dataset = "pseudobulk_deconv"),
  dproc_harmonized %>% mutate(dataset = "scrnaseq")
)

for (ct in names(ct_comp_diff)) {
  # Plot the histograms
  p <- ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = !!sym(ct), fill = dataset)) +
    geom_histogram(alpha = 0.5, position = "identity", bins = 30) +
    labs(title = "Histograms from Two Dataframes", x = "Value", y = "Count") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(ct)
  print(p)
  
  ratio_pb_vs_scrna <- mean(deconv_ct_comps_harmonized[, ct]) / mean(dproc_harmonized[, ct])
  hist(ct_comp_diff[, ct], main = paste0("ct\nRatio of pseudobulk abundance vs scRNA-seq: ", round(ratio_pb_vs_scrna, 2)))
}


```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Method Benchmark

## All CMV

### Load seurat object

```{r}
seurat <- load_seurat_object("gongsharma_all.h5ad")
seurat$Sample <- seurat$specimen.specimenGuid
seurat <- seurat |> NormalizeData() |> FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 2000)
hvg <- seurat@assays[["RNA"]]@var.features
```

### Create plots

```{r}
label_condition <- "subject.cmv"
low_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L1"
hi_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L3"

plot_list <- list()
labels <- get_labels(seurat, label_condition)

# Pseudobulk
pseudobulk <- as.matrix(AggregateExpression(seurat_object, group.by = "Sample", assays = "RNA")[["RNA"]])
pseudobulk_hvg <- pseudobulk[hvg,]
plot_list[["pseudobulk"]] <- process_pseudobulk_fig(pseudobulk_hvg, labels, hvg)


# Deconvolute using EPIC
plot_list[["deconv"]] <- process_deconv_fig(pseudobulk, labels)

# CoDA
## layer1: low res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_lowres"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, low_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - low res. cell types")

## layer2: high res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_hires"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, hi_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - high res. cell types")

# MOFA
plot_list[["mofa"]] <- process_mofa_fig(seurat, labels, hvg, pseudobulk_hvg, file.path("gongsharma_all_mofa_object.rds"))

# scITD
plot_list[["scitd"]] <- process_scitd_fig(seurat, low_res_ct_col, label_condition, hvg)

# MrVI
plot_list[["mrvi"]] <- process_mrvi_fig(seurat, "./gongsharma_all_dists.nc", low_res_ct_col, label_condition)


p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "PUBLICATION_PCAs_benchmark_gongsharma_all_cmv.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 10)
```


## All gender

### Create plots

```{r}
label_condition <- "subject.biologicalSex"
low_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L1"
hi_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L3"

plot_list <- list()
labels <- get_labels(seurat, label_condition)

# Pseudobulk
pseudobulk <- as.matrix(AggregateExpression(seurat, group.by = "Sample", assays = "RNA")[["RNA"]])
pseudobulk_hvg <- pseudobulk[hvg,]
plot_list[["pseudobulk"]] <- process_pseudobulk_fig(pseudobulk_hvg, labels, hvg)


# Deconvolute using EPIC
plot_list[["deconv"]] <- process_deconv_fig(pseudobulk, labels)

# CoDA
## layer1: low res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_lowres"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, low_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - low res. cell types")

## layer2: high res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_hires"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, hi_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - high res. cell types")

# MOFA
plot_list[["mofa"]] <- process_mofa_fig(seurat, labels, hvg, pseudobulk_hvg, file.path("gongsharma_all_mofa_object.rds"))

# scITD
plot_list[["scitd"]] <- process_scitd_fig(seurat, low_res_ct_col, label_condition, hvg)

# MrVI
plot_list[["mrvi"]] <- process_mrvi_fig(seurat, "./gongsharma_all_dists.nc", low_res_ct_col, label_condition)


p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "PUBLICATION_PCAs_benchmark_gongsharma_all_gender.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 10)
```




## Gender (CMV negative)

### Load seurat objects

```{r}
seurat <- load_seurat_object("gongsharma_gender_cmvneg.h5ad")
seurat$Sample <- seurat$specimen.specimenGuid
seurat <- seurat |> NormalizeData() |> FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 2000)
hvg <- seurat@assays[["RNA"]]@var.features
```


### Create plots

```{r}
label_condition <- "subject.biologicalSex"
low_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L1"
hi_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L3"

plot_list <- list()
labels <- get_labels(seurat, label_condition)

# Pseudobulk
pseudobulk <- as.matrix(AggregateExpression(seurat, group.by = "Sample", assays = "RNA")[["RNA"]])
pseudobulk_hvg <- pseudobulk[hvg,]
plot_list[["pseudobulk"]] <- process_pseudobulk_fig(pseudobulk_hvg, labels, hvg)


# Deconvolute using EPIC
plot_list[["deconv"]] <- process_deconv_fig(pseudobulk, labels)

# CoDA
## layer1: low res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_lowres"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, low_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - low res. cell types")

## layer2: high res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_hires"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, hi_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - high res. cell types")

# MOFA
plot_list[["mofa"]] <- process_mofa_fig(seurat, labels, hvg, pseudobulk_hvg, file.path("gongsharma_gender_cmvneg_mofa_object.rds"))

# scITD
plot_list[["scitd"]] <- process_scitd_fig(seurat, low_res_ct_col, label_condition, hvg)

# MrVI
plot_list[["mrvi"]] <- process_mrvi_fig(seurat, "./gongsharma_gender_cmvneg_dists.nc", low_res_ct_col, label_condition)


p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "PUBLICATION_PCAs_benchmark_gongsharma_gender_cmvneg.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 10)
```


## CMV (females)

### Load seurat objects

```{r}
seurat <- load_seurat_object("gongsharma_cmv_females.h5ad")

seurat$Sample <- seurat$specimen.specimenGuid
seurat <- seurat |> NormalizeData() |> FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 2000)
hvg <- seurat@assays[["RNA"]]@var.features
```



### Create plots

```{r}
label_condition <- "subject.cmv"
low_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L1"
hi_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L3"

plot_list <- list()
labels <- get_labels(seurat, label_condition)

# Pseudobulk
pseudobulk <- as.matrix(AggregateExpression(seurat, group.by = "Sample", assays = "RNA")[["RNA"]])
pseudobulk_hvg <- pseudobulk[hvg,]
plot_list[["pseudobulk"]] <- process_pseudobulk_fig(pseudobulk_hvg, labels, hvg)

# Deconvolute using EPIC
plot_list[["deconv"]] <- process_deconv_fig(pseudobulk, labels)

# CoDA
## layer1: low res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_lowres"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, low_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - low res. cell types")

## layer2: high res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_hires"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, hi_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - high res. cell types")

# MOFA
seurat <- UpdateSeuratObject(seurat)
plot_list[["mofa"]] <- process_mofa_fig(seurat, labels, hvg, pseudobulk_hvg, file.path("gongsharma_cmv_females_mofa_object.rds"))

# scITD
plot_list[["scitd"]] <- process_scitd_fig(seurat, low_res_ct_col, label_condition, hvg)

# MrVI
plot_list[["mrvi"]] <- process_mrvi_fig(seurat, "./gongsharma_cmv_females_dists.nc", low_res_ct_col, label_condition)


p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "PUBLICATION_PCAs_benchmark_gongsharma_cmv_females.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 10)
```


## Age (females cmvneg)

### Load seurat objects

```{r}
seurat <- load_seurat_object("gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg.h5ad")
seurat$Sample <- seurat$specimen.specimenGuid
seurat$age <- as.factor(ifelse(seurat$sample.subjectAgeAtDraw < 50, "young", "old"))
seurat <- seurat |> NormalizeData() |> FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 2000)
hvg <- seurat@assays[["RNA"]]@var.features
```



### Create plots

```{r}
label_condition <- "age"
low_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L1"
hi_res_ct_col <- "AIFI_L3"

plot_list <- list()
labels <- get_labels(seurat, label_condition)

# Pseudobulk
pseudobulk <- as.matrix(AggregateExpression(seurat, group.by = "Sample", assays = "RNA")[["RNA"]])
pseudobulk_hvg <- pseudobulk[hvg,]
plot_list[["pseudobulk"]] <- process_pseudobulk_fig(pseudobulk_hvg, labels, hvg)


# Deconvolute using EPIC
plot_list[["deconv"]] <- process_deconv_fig(pseudobulk, labels)

# CoDA
## layer1: low res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_lowres"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, low_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - low res. cell types")

## layer2: high res. cell types
plot_list[["coda_hires"]] <- process_coda_fig(seurat, labels, hi_res_ct_col, title = "Cell type composition - high res. cell types")

# MOFA
seurat <- UpdateSeuratObject(seurat)
plot_list[["mofa"]] <- process_mofa_fig(seurat, labels, hvg, pseudobulk_hvg, file.path("gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg_mofa_object.rds"))

# scITD
plot_list[["scitd"]] <- process_scitd_fig(seurat, low_res_ct_col, label_condition, hvg)

# MrVI
plot_list[["mrvi"]] <- process_mrvi_fig(seurat, "./gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg_dists.nc", low_res_ct_col, label_condition)


p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "PUBLICATION_PCAs_benchmark_gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 10)
```
